note.fr: <ph id='shankara'>Śaṅkara</ph> systématise l'<mv id='vedanta'>Advaita Vedānta</mv> en s'appuyant explicitement sur <ph id='gaudapada'>Gauḍapāda</ph>, dont il prolonge la doctrine de la <c>non-dualité</c> de l'âme et de l'absolu.
note.en: <ph id='shankara'>Śaṅkara</ph> systematises <mv id='vedanta'>Advaita Vedānta</mv> by leaning explicitly on <ph id='gaudapada'>Gauḍapāda</ph>, whose doctrine of the <c>non-duality</c> of the self and the absolute he carries on.

sources.en: Śaṅkara, Commentary on the Brahma Sūtras
